hooks.command: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/harness" && npm run --if-present lint 2>&1 && npm run --if-present build 2>&1 && npm run --if-present test 2>&1

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE 'rm\s+(-[a-z]*r[a-z]*\s+)*-[a-z]*f|rm\s+(-[a-z]*f[a-z]*\s+)*-[a-z]*r|git\s+push\s+.*--force|git\s+push\s+.*-f|git\s+reset\s+.*--hard|drop\s+table'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.' >&2; exit 1; fi
